title: Unstable Universe Datapack (Wemmbu Nukes)
description: A datapack that adds many features from the popular scripted Minecraft series Unstable Universe.
body:
## OVERVIEW
Have you ever wanted to simulate parts of Unstable, like the Invisible Mafia or Wemmbu and Flamefrags' duel? Well with this custom datapack, you can! It adds many of these features (YES, INCLUDING WEMMBU'S NUKES). It is also incredibly optimized compared to other nuke datapacks, and a datapack, meaning you can add it to a vanilla world just by dragging it into your datapacks folder.

## HOW TO USE
You can use the _/trigger_ command followed by the thing you want to run to use features of the pack. For example, do: 
```
/trigger nukerod
```
This will give yourself a fishrod that remotely drops a nuke wherever you are looking! After typing _/trigger_, the rest of the commands will be suggested, and you can easily click or press TAB to autofill them.

At the time of writing this, this pack *only* supports *1.21.4*, and I do not plan on downgrading it to 1.21.1 or other versions. However, I may update it to work in later versions, and some features may still work then, feel free to try it out.

I have also heard that some features don't work on Paper (including Spigot, Bukkit, Purpur, etc.) servers in some instances, so try to stick to Vanilla or Fabric servers if you're using a server.

## FEATURES
- Nuke fishing rods (/trigger nukerod) - Remotely call an orbital nuke.
- Stab fishing rods (/trigger stabrod) - Remotely call an orbital stab shot.
- Dog cannons (/trigger dogrod) - Summon an army of 100 armed and potted dogs.
- Dog clears (/trigger dogclear) - Kill all dogs summoned by this.
- Joining the Mafia (/trigger joinmafia) - Be splashed with invis and enter the Mafia.
- Leaving the Mafia (/trigger leavemafia) - Leave the Mafia.
- Stasising other Mafia members (/trigger mafiastasisrod) - Stasis the Mafia member you are looking at into the void.
- Toggling PvP (/trigger pvp) - Toggle players fighting each other.
- Toggling Deathkick (/trigger deathkick) - Send a fake leave message when a player dies and set them to spectator.
- Enchanting items (/trigger enchant) - Max enchant the item you are holding, excluding conflicting enchants.

## HOW IT WORKS
For those interested, the nukes are copied from a real orbital strike cannon, spawned using _/place template_. The nuke has a size of 8 and the stab has a depth of 276. I fired the cannon and froze the game, then used a structure block to copy the TNT, ensuring maximum accuracy. However, since Unstable doesn't function with a real orbital strike cannon, it most likely uses a plugin of its own, so this pack may be slightly more realistic than Unstable itself, depending on how you look at it.

## OTHER
NOTE: THIS PACK IS NOT AFFILIATED WITH UNSTABLE UNIVERSE'S CREATORS, MERELY INSPIRED BY THEM
